mapper.select: SELECT u.user_seq, u.user_id, u.password, u.name, u.nickname, u.email, u.phone, u.user_type, u.created_at, s.store_seq, s.user_seq AS store_user_seq, s.biz_number, s.company_name, s.opening_date, s.zonecode, s.address1, s.address2 FROM users u LEFT JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE u.user_id = #{id} AND u.user_type = #{user_type}
